home.available: Available for full-stack and automation work
home.name: Evyatar Hazan
home.subtitle: Full Stack Developer & Automation Builder
home.description: I build practical, production-ready software: React interfaces, Express APIs, Prisma-backed systems, monorepos, mobile app foundations, and privacy-conscious tools. I care about repositories that are clear, tested, documented, and easy to trust.

about.p1: I focus on full-stack product development with a strong emphasis on clean architecture, accessible user experiences, and reliable developer workflows. My projects are organized as maintainable repositories with clear scripts, CI, and careful handling of secrets.
about.p2: My current portfolio includes public monorepos, client-side utilities, medical and nonprofit tools, a React Native password generator, and several backend-driven products. I like turning messy project history into focused, credible software assets.

online_converter.title: Online Converter
online_converter.description: A browser-only conversion tool for JSON, CSV, XML, and YAML. Built with React, TypeScript, i18n, copy/download flows, and CI.

emergency_protocol.title: Emergency Protocol Diagram
emergency_protocol.description: A full-stack emergency protocol monorepo with a React client, Express API, Prisma, Google OAuth, comments, and CI.

lev_chedva.title: Lev Hedva
lev_chedva.description: An active full-stack monorepo for the Lev Hedva website, client app, and backend API.

password_gen.title: Password Generator
password_gen.description: A privacy-first password generator monorepo with a React Native mobile app and reusable core package.

test_yourself.title: Test Yourself
test_yourself.description: A full-stack learning and quiz platform monorepo with a React client, Express API, validation scripts, and CI.

united_hatzalah.title: United Hatzalah Shoham Branch
united_hatzalah.description: A full-stack branch website and admin API monorepo with React, Express, Prisma, Cloudinary integration, and CI.

contact.subtitle: Reach out for full-stack projects, automation workflows, repository cleanup, or frontend architecture work.
contact.getInTouchDesc: Send a short note and I'll get back to you.
